mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.entrust_id, t1.sample_id, t1.check_item_name AS checkItemName, t1.check_item_id, t1.times, t1.unit_price, t1.task_id + IFNULL(t1.bit_value,0) as task_id, t1.dept_id as technicistId, t2.sample_code, t2.sample_name FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId}
